title: Tata CLiQ is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Tata CLiQ is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Tata CLiQ. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Gurgaon-based team.

About Tata CLiQ:
Tata CLiQ is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata CLiQ!
